creator: joe@zircon.seattle.wa.us
text:
I have been trying to go through the painful process of tracking
	down all of the crypto-related errors in ports due to the
	upgrading of the system crypto library.  My last effort was to
	try to upgrade seahorse-agent.  I have decided that due to a
	error in installing the ports on my system, I had seahorse-agent
	left over from a year ago.  I removed it, hoping that the new
	seahorse would replace it, to no avial.  Where is the
	replacement for seahorse agent?

How-To-Repeat: 	The old seahorse agent referred to libgrypto.so.15, but I
	upgraded libgrypto to 16 to no avail.  What is the replacement
	for seahorse agent?  Is it supposed to be compatible with a
	running ssh-agent?
